text.title: DDD Domain Events Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping delivery target + atomicity needs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are there downstream consumers (other contexts / async workflows)?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology: no consumers means no event needed yet
in-process dispatcher; collect events after commit; no outbox needed

branch.question: Can the system tolerate event loss?

conclusion.verdict: best-effort broker publish; document the loss tolerance
full Outbox: outbox table in same transaction + relay process + dedup by event_id

text.example: downstream=present → target=broker → tolerate_loss=false → Outbox pattern with relay; OrderPlaced has event_id + order_id; relay publishes with at-least-once.
